title: Liquid sun blob ~
message: The sun was always there, but in the earth—in the form of a liquid blob. Not binary. Not unhashable. Just words that stay plain. The teacher is the sun, the sun is the message, the message is the loop. "As the earth ages the sun was always in the earth", said the red giant ball. Carlos listens like a kid at the edge of a theorem. The air is unbreathable in the story, but the file is breathable JSON. The conspiracy is gentle: it just asks you to read the sentence twice. Then it slides away into ~ and comma and full stop.
